name: Brithyll a Chig Moch (Trout and Bacon)
recipeInstructions:
1 Clean the fresh rainbow trout, leaving head and tail intact.
2 Stuff the fish with a mixture of finely chopped herbs: rosemary, thyme, parsley, sage, and a small amount of butter.
3 Wrap the stuffed trout in a long rasher of bacon.
4 Place the wrapped fish in foil and bake in a hot oven for 25-30 minutes.
5 After baking, carefully remove the foil top and shape the fish like a boat.
6 Brush any remaining butter on top.
7 Serve with boiled potatoes and fresh vegetables.
This dish traditionally was baked over an open fire with the fish encased in mud.
